name: Jina AI
description: Jina AI is an open-source neural search framework for building cloud-native neural search solutions that are fast, scalable, and reliable.
longDescription: Jina AI is a cloud-native neural search framework that enables organizations to build search solutions powered by deep learning in a production environment. It allows developers to build cross-modal and multi-modal applications powered by deep learning in a distributed way. Jina AI provides a complete solution for neural search workflows, including data preprocessing, neural model encoding, index building, and query processing. The platform supports various data types including text, images, video, and audio.
